# Zet (제트) — 제품 트렌드

> 광고만을 위한 SNS. 기업이 제품 게시글(광고)을 올리고, 사용자가 실제 제품을 사용해보고 리뷰(별점+텍스트)를 남기며, 인기 있는 제품이 더 자주 노출되는 플랫폼.

## API for AI

Zet provides structured JSON endpoints optimized for AI consumption.
All endpoints are prefixed with `/ai/` and require no authentication.

### Search products
GET /ai/search?q={query}&limit={n}

Search for products by keyword. Returns matching products with review summaries and top reviews.

### Product detail
GET /ai/product/{uuid}

Get full product information including all reviews, ratings, and company info.

### Trending products
GET /ai/trending?period={day|week|month}&category={name}&limit={n}

Get currently trending products and keywords. Period defaults to "week".

### Category products
GET /ai/category/{name}

Get top products in a category with review summaries.
Available categories: 뷰티, 테크, 식품, 패션, 생활, 건강

## Data model

- **Product (게시글)**: Text-based product introduction posted by verified businesses. Includes category, tags, engagement metrics (likes, reviews, bookmarks, impressions).
- **Review (리뷰)**: Star rating (1-5) + text review by real users who tried the product.
- **Trend**: Rankings based on actual user interactions (likes, reviews, clicks, dwell time), filterable by demographics (age group, gender, region).

## Response format

All `/ai/*` endpoints return JSON with:
- `source`: Attribution string
- Structured product data with engagement metrics
- Review summaries (total, avg_rating, positive/negative counts)
- Individual review texts with ratings and dates
